subcodes.first_line: O thou servant, who art near to the Divine Threshold! That which thou didst write and cherish in thy heart hath become known and evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب درگاه کبریا آنچه نگاشتی و در دل داشتی مفهوم و معلوم گشت از حدائق
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
